mapper.update: update EnglishVocabularyLearningRecordsTable set lDate=CURDATE() where vId=#{vId} and uId=#{uId};
mapper.insert: insert into EnglishVocabularyLearningRecordsTable (vId, uId, lDate,) values(#{vId}, #{uId}, #{lDate});
mapper.delete: delete from EnglishVocabularyLearningRecordsTable where vId=#{vId} and uId=#{uId};
mapper.select: select ET.*, ELRT.uId, ELRT.lDate, EXP(-0.8 * DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), ELRT.lDate)) as retention_value from EnglishVocabularyLearningRecordsTable ELRT join EnglishVocabularyTable ET on ET.vId = ELRT.vId where ELRT.uId=#{uId} order by retention_value asc limit #{limit} offset #{offset};
select count(*) from EnglishVocabularyLearningRecordsTable ELRT join EnglishVocabularyTable ET on ET.vId = ELRT.vId where ELRT.uId=#{uId};

select ET.*, ELRT.uId, ELRT.lDate, EXP(-0.8 * DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), ELRT.lDate)) as retention_value from EnglishVocabularyLearningRecordsTable ELRT join EnglishVocabularyTable ET on ET.vId = ELRT.vId where EXP(-0.8 * DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), ELRT.lDate)) < 0.4 and ELRT.uId=#{uId} order by retention_value asc limit 1;
